metrics_explanation.Background SSIM: Higher is better. Measures how well the unedited background was preserved. (Max 1.0)
metrics_explanation.Global CLIP: Higher is better. Measures full-image alignment to text. Orig baseline should be lowest (before edit).
metrics_explanation.Masked CLIP: Higher is better. Evaluates ONLY the targeted edit region. High scores prove localized precision.
metrics_explanation.FID: Lower is better. Measures overall realism compared to the original photos.
